title: Progeny Mod
description: This mod is the Progeny Mod for the Progeny Minecraft Server. Currently it adds the capability to poison all food types, remove other effects from all food types, and the meat and rotten flesh block.
body:
The Progeny Mod is a mod used within a medieval environment used for the Progeny Minecraft Server.

Currently it adds:
- Ability to Poison any edible item with a slimeball.
- Adds Meat, Rotten Flesh Block, and Temporary Axe, Pickaxe, and Shovel blocks (for texture packs)
- Ability to remove potion effects from any edible item


This mod requires KubeJS for detecting all possible food items within the game to poison. It is possible to poison any modded food as well.
